top_signals.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
top_signals.summary: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Correspondence: DAO 06/26 Protection of the UK's National Security Through Public Procurement
top_signals.summary: ‘Dear Accounting Officer’ letters provide advice on accountability, regularity, propriety, value for money and annual accounting exercises.
